How Did the Leopard Get its Spots?
programme.desc: Mathematician and cryptographer Alan Turing came up with a chemical theory of morphogenesis to explain why leopards have spots. It's not proven, but recently bio-chemists have discovered chemicals are working as he predicted.

programme.title: Programming and Coding
programme.desc: How did people compute before the invention of computers? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of computing. Have hands-on fun by making your own abacus, and get to know Ada Lovelace, the first computer programmer before the invention of computers.

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.title: Grownups
programme.desc: When Yoko misunderstands the definition of the word ‘grownup', the kids get caught in a bureaucratic loop with Yoko as a crazy boss!

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: Heavy Surgery
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have got one day's experience under their belts. Today a wild boar needs the Junior Vets' help, a tiny dog goes in a massive scanner, and a snotty cow is having heavy surgery.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: The Tessell Nation
programme.desc: In this episode we learn about tessellations: shapes repeated over and over again covering a plane without any gaps or overlaps. Can mathemagician Eric create a tessellation that has the shape of his own head?

programme.title: Man v Monkey
programme.desc: The doctors go head-to-head in a man vs monkey contest to demonstrate the power of the pelvis. Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph take you on a safari, and the Cupboard of Everything is on the move to the 1950s.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: Abraca-Doki
programme.desc: When amateur magician Doki accidentally makes Gabi's worm vanish, Gabi is in a panic. How can they bring Lancelot back? To find out, Team Doki travels to a magic show in Las Vegas, Nevada to ask for help from a real magician named The Fantabulous Fenn.

programme.title: You Ain't Seen Nothing Yeti
programme.desc: The annual winter carnival seems to be in trouble when Addison and Alex's yeti sculpture appears to have been vandalized... perhaps by an actual angry yeti!

programme.title: Superheroes
programme.desc: Some noisy construction work starts near the ancient oak, producing lots of smoke and disturbing the animals and plants nearby. The three friends and Yokо use their superpowers to protect the park. But things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Telescope
programme.desc: Henry meets a giant observatory telescope, and becomes an Astronomer to help Telescope track down a new constellation he discovered.

programme.title: To Sleep Perchance to Invade
programme.desc: When Teresa's dream-projector puts a dream of peaceful surrender into the heads of every sleeping human in town, the only way Team Alien can fight her is to go into the dream themselves.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: E14 - It's Time/Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Mordecai becomes extremely jealous when Rigby manages to get a date with Margaret. Mordecai tries to prevent Rigby from getting to his date on time by destroying all the clocks they have.

programme.title: E129 - Scared Silly/Introducing Kevin 11/Buggy Out/The Chupaca-Bro/Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: When the Rust Bucket runs out of gas on a foggy, East Coast road, Ben, Gwen and Max are forced to stay at a hotel being menaced by Creepy Carl - a local folklore expert, who may actually be a ghost!

programme.title: E1 - Home Movie/Fish Sitting/The Cruise/Coconut Shy/Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean makes his own horror movie and ropes in Mrs Wicket as the star!

programme.title: E136 - Bonehead/Bathy Daffy/End Of The Leash: Bullseye Painting/Rabbit Sandwich Maker/Put Th
programme.desc: A dog uncovers trouble when he buries a bone in Bugs Bunny's hole.

programme.title: E6 - A. The Gi/The Kiss/The Party/The Refund/The Robot
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin love the way they look in their new karate outfits and vow never to take them off.

programme.title: E66 - Stump Brothers/Sneaky Peeky
programme.desc: After Clarence and Sumo cause a power disruption in Sumo's family home, they are sent off into the hot desert, with Sumo's older brother, to retrieve a generator part. Will they survive the trek or will Sumo's sibling rivalry boil over?

programme.title: E35 - Watermelon Steven/Garnet's Universe
programme.desc: Steven discovers a new power when he grows a patch of Steven-shaped watermelons!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Since the first series began in 2015, “Inside Stories of Kyoto” has portrayed Kyoto's hidden elegance through both drama and documentary. After the second season reached a full-circle finale, the series finally returns in 2026. Set once again at Kurakuya Harunobu, a 240‑year‑old confectionery, the story picks up eight years after Sawafuji Miyako's departure for Paris. Now a new heroine, Mikami Miyako, arrives from France with a daunting mission. Confronted with Kyoto's intricate traditions and its proud, strong‑willed residents, she must find her own way forward.

programme.title: E14 - Lilly Is Ill
programme.desc: Lily is telling everyone the story about an orange kitten and spotted cat fishing.

programme.title: E3 - Ahoy Captain Pak Choi
programme.desc: Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E86 - This Way, That Way
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: E30 - Planet Pop Beam
programme.desc: The friends travel into outer space to visit Planet Popbeam. Mae-Mae wonders if the planet is made of cheese, but Phoebe thinks it's made of rock.

programme.title: E20 - Dog Loves Diggers
programme.desc: Dog and Pug are on a building site and they meet three Diggers - Big Digger, Bigger Digger and Tiny. The two big diggers look down on Tiny but she is the one who wants to do all the work.

programme.title: E11 - It's Time To Dance
programme.desc: Gran Gran busts a groove when she teaches JoJo the moves to a traditional Saint Lucian dance. JoJo finds that learning a dance can take time, before realising she can put her own twist on it.

programme.title: E10 - It's Time To Look At Old Pictures
programme.desc: A photo of Gran Gran and JoJo's mummy when she was a little girl inspires them to take a walk and compare old photos of their neighbourhood to see how it has changed over time.

programme.title: E17 - Calypso
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E15 - Andy And The Hawksbill Turtles
programme.desc: Andy's heads to the island of Barbados to help rescue some baby Hawksbill turtles.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E21 - A New Arrival
programme.desc: When Thomas finds out that the Earl's Technology Fair will bring new inventions to Sodor, he fears the Sodor engines will be replaced by new technology.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E1454
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: News Talk -29/3/26
programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E473
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E164
programme.desc: Phoenix Satellite TV creates a brand-new Greater Bay Area magazine-style column 'GBA Discovery' with a total duration of 26 minutes. Phoenix reporters visited the Greater Bay Area in person and discovered the latest and most interesting events, people, and achievements in the Greater Bay Area. The column is divided into three sections: hotspots in the Bay Area, people in the Bay Area, and coordinates in the Bay Area.

programme.title: E218
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: The newly launched observation documentary program. Each issue takes a foreigner as the protagonist, travels all over China and observes China's social conditions and Chinese people's life from a close perspective.

programme.title: E622
programme.desc: CHIT CHAT WITH ME: Chit Chat With Me packs with news from all over the world, including hot social issues, new moves in the cultural circles and many more, it delivers vivid, kaleidoscopic and glossy news to the audience in the weekend.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: E2 - Slammin' Salmon
programme.desc: Join the frantic dash to cash in on July’s salmon run with the Stage 1 winners and some tough new recruits. Tag along on BigBoi's food-finding road trip, welcome QuadMom and RedBack to the feast, and see if BoldFace can keep her surviving cub safe.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: Politzek - Voices That Defy The Kremlin
programme.desc: In Russia, criticizing President Putin has become a criminal offense. Thousands have been imprisoned. Such political prisoners are called Politzek. This documentary delves deep into this system of repression and gives the Politzek a voice.

programme.title: Taking The Lead
programme.desc: Since 2015, women in every country in the world have officially had the right to vote. It's been a long road to this point. And although today many countries are led by women, they are still underrepresented in politics and public life.

programme.title: Microalgae: A Superpower In Carbon Capture And City Cleanup
programme.desc: It's slimy, green, and alive - and absorbs more CO2 than most trees. Are Kerala's new 'liquid trees' a gamechanger?

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: Taking The Lead
programme.desc: Since 2015, women in every country in the world have officially had the right to vote. It's been a long road to this point. And although today many countries are led by women, they are still underrepresented in politics and public life.

programme.title: Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape
programme.desc: Join us in Valencia, Spain! DW's Sarah Hucal takes you through her favorite city. She dives into historic plazas, vibrant street art, lively markets and the stunning City of Arts and Sciences. Discover why this might be Spain's most underrated big city - and taste local favorites from creamy horchata to iconic paella.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Vienna
programme.desc: Vienna is beautiful. Surrounded by elegant imperial facades, people enjoy culture and coffee. Or, they might clatter past St. Stephen's Cathedral and the Sisi Museum in horse-drawn carriages. But when night falls, the city shows itself in a whole new light.

programme.title: Taking The Lead
programme.desc: Since 2015, women in every country in the world have officially had the right to vote. It's been a long road to this point. And although today many countries are led by women, they are still underrepresented in politics and public life.

programme.title: Astrosara - Training With Spain's First Female Astronaut
programme.desc: In Spain she's a media star. Known as AstroSara on YouTube, Sara Garcia Alonso is a science communicator, author, molecular biologist - and future ESA reserve astronaut. We accompany her as she prepares for the job.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: Why How We Chew Our Food Matters For Our Health
programme.desc: It's not only what we eat or when we eat it - how we chew matters too. Discover the latest research on how eating habits shape digestion, metabolism and overall health.

programme.title: E8 - Siblings Month: Safety First!
programme.desc: The siblings are learning that it's safety first! First, Mom & Dad teach the kids how to have fun & stay safe at the beach. Then, the whole family helps Baby John search for his missing Teddy! The safety lessons continue as they learn to put away their toys to avoid accidents & learn about stranger safety with the story of 'Little Red Riding Hood.' Plus, they act out 'The Three Little Pigs' & help the Itsy Bitsy Spider!

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!

Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

E19
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

E1285
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E318
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E613
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of 'Superman' , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E2 - Noodles

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: E14 - The Women Salt Workers
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

programme.title: E20 - 「音緣」好友大聚會 (下)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: China Financial Intelligence
programme.desc: China Financial Intelligence: Based in Shanghai, the program explores the economic development of mainland China in a comprehensive and in-depth way, so that the world can have a more accurate understanding of China and Shanghai.

programme.title: News Talk
programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: News Times
programme.desc: News Time is meant to put events into historical perspective. The background and history comparison are supplemented with keen observation, critical thinking and interviews, delivering unique insights into trends, thereby casting light on China's future.

Why Cheat India
programme.desc: A corrupt man ruins the life of students by exploiting the flaws of the education system.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?
